name: visit_summaries
description: AI-powered visit summaries: Previous Visit, Since Last Visit, and After Visit Summary generation for clinical notes.

SimpleAPI endpoints for reading and writing visit-summary configuration.
Authenticated endpoints serving loading pages with spinners.
